docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY GODDYN PETER T. AS TO DEFENDANT THOMSON CHARLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
